facts.statement: Session is in opening phase — no substantive issue has been introduced
Procedural prerequisite: parties must first understand the mediation framework before substantive work begins
Party A has identified three asset categories (home, bank accounts, business) but has not completed their statement
Business complexity flagged ('complicated with a lot of history') — likely material for any division options
Financial disclosure is legally required in divorce proceedings — parties cannot negotiate property division without baseline documentation
Business valuation complexity is real — financial statements for operating businesses do require context and often expert interpretation
This is a threshold dispute about disclosure sequence, not substantive settlement terms
Party B made specific documentation request in T4 — account statements, business valuation/balance sheet, debt documentation

facts_notes: Facts remain separated from unresolved feasibility questions.
